title: Vendor Attribution Event
description: Emitted by the vendor-nimbus Integration Service API Workflow when the Vector Hypothesis Agent has established sufficient evidence that Nimbus Patient Engagement Platform is the shared attack vector. This drives Reversal 2 — ClearFlow confirmed not the vector; Nimbus identified as the shared upstream cause.

source_system.description: The vendor Integration Service API Workflow.

vendor_id.description: The attributed vendor. Must match vocabulary.stakeholders.vendor id.

evidence_signal_strength.description: How strong the attribution evidence is. Starts 'weak' at Day 1; reaches 'strong' by Day 5.

connected_provider_ids.description: Provider IDs using this vendor (from Data Fabric Vendor.connected_providers).

clearflow_cleared.description: Whether the Forensic Self-Exam Agent has cleared ClearFlow as the breach vector.

vector_hypothesis_confidence.description: Confidence score from Vector Hypothesis Agent (0.0–1.0).

maestro_trigger_filter_hint.description: Paste this as the Maestro Trigger FilterTree JSON when wiring this event to a stage transition in Slice 010/012. Routes to edge_ALryM7 (Multi-Customer Investigation → Vector Isolation).
